channel.title: Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Analysis of Caregiver Burden in Palliative Care: An Integrated Review
Effects of Nonpharmacological Interventions for Fatigue in Patients with Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
Current Pharmacogenetic Approach for Oxaliplatin-induced Peripheral Neuropathy among Patients with Colorectal Cancer: A Systematic Review
Software Development (JooYoung Seo, Soyoung Choi)
item.description:
Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018a). Ezpickr: Import various data file types as a rectangular form using a file picker dialogue box. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ezpickr

Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018b). Mboxr: Converting an mbox file into a tibble. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mboxr

item.title: The Influence of Self-care Agency and Social Support as Factors Influencing Self-care Practice in Spinal Cord Injured Patients
The Rapidly Changing World of Accessible Online Learning
item.description: This panel discussion has been presented in 2017 AECT in Florida.
